sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6091" key="a)mfi/sfura" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφίσφῠρα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, kind of <sense id="n6091.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shoes,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:94" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.94</biblScope> </bibl> (prob. f.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀμφίσφαιρα</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
